overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring Aloy traversing a rainy tropical jungle at dusk with vibrant red vegetation, followed by a hard transition to a snowy winter landscape with geothermal hot springs. The clip showcases the game's diverse biomes and cinematic third-person traversal mechanics.

segments.scene_description: Aloy traverses a rain-soaked tropical jungle at dusk, wading through a shallow river surrounded by tall palm trees and vibrant red vegetation. The sky glows purple-pink as storm clouds gather, with massive rock spires visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen geothermal valley with hot springs

events.description: hard cut from tropical jungle to snowy winter biome with frozen lake
approaching steaming turquoise geothermal pool with visible steam vents

cracked ice surface reflecting the sky
bright blue hot spring with rising steam
tall mountain peak covered in snow
geothermal steam rising from the ground near the hot spring

segments.scene_description: Following a scene transition, Aloy explores a frozen winter landscape with snow-covered pine forests and a cracked ice lake. The character approaches a vibrant turquoise geothermal hot spring emitting steam, with snow-capped mountains visible in the background under a pale dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked tropical jungle as the atmosphere shifts toward a gathering storm. It begins with Aloy wading through a shallow river, surrounded by towering palm trees and vibrant red vegetation. As she progresses, the camera captures the deepening hues of a purple-pink sky that signals the onset of dusk. The scene then expands to reveal massive rock spires looming in the distance while storm clouds increasingly crowd the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a frozen winter wilderness that culminates in the discovery of a geothermal oasis. It begins with Aloy traversing a desolate landscape of snow-covered pine forests and a vast, cracked ice lake. As the camera moves forward, the pale dusk sky frames a backdrop of towering snow-capped mountains. The scene then shifts toward a sudden burst of color as the character approaches a vibrant turquoise geothermal hot spring. Finally, the movement settles around the steaming waters, contrasting the warmth of the spring against the surrounding frost.
